steps.title: Find the absolute phrase
steps.content: After the comma, "its vehicles ______ by collectors" forms an absolute phrase describing the Brass Era. That phrase needs a participial adjective, not a full tensed verb.

steps.title: Reject finite verb phrases
steps.content: Choice B, Choice C, and Choice D are finite verb phrases; after the comma, any of them would create a second clause without the right punctuation. The remaining option supplies the needed participial modifier. The answer is A.
